title: For first time, a cell built from scratch grows and divides
author: defrost
aiHeadline: Scientists finally manage to create a cell from scratch, proving that even the simplest tasks take years of research and funding.

title: Most arguments are about ego, not ideas
author: backlit4034
aiHeadline: Groundbreaking study reveals that most arguments are just people trying to hear themselves talk, because ideas are overrated.

title: Physical disc production ending in Jan 2028 for new games on PlayStation
author: Tiberium
aiHeadline: PlayStation announces the end of physical discs in 2028, because who needs tangible media when you can just download it and lose it forever?

title: Asahi Linux 7.1 Progress Report
author: pantalaimon
aiHeadline: Asahi Linux 7.1 is here, bringing you more updates because why not? Just kidding, it's actually a big deal for some people.

title: Godot will no longer accept AI-authored code contributions
author: pjmlp
aiHeadline: Godot Engine says goodbye to AI contributions, because apparently, AI can't be trusted to write code that doesn't crash your game.
